evidence.excerpt: on the road again at 8.55. We went on + on + will be getting to Crail about 4.15. Conta has rented a house where we are staying. She is organising a pre-wedding supper
The wedding was beautiful in the Cow Shed at Crail. ... Over 200 at the wedding.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page B_0361_L opens mid-journey ('on the road again at 8.55'), so this trip actually began in the previous window; only its tail (wedding weekend) is visible here.

evidence.excerpt: Friday March 25th. We left home at 9.45. to take Tinder to the vet. ... We travelled all morning up to the Peak District + parked [Seplurt?] at Alsop on the Tissington Trail.
(end of Crail trip immediately before) picked up dog from Jackie + hurried home before Conta gets there!

boundaries.mixed_detail: Crail trip ends earlier on this page ('hurried home before Conta gets there!'); the Peak District trip begins at '__Friday March 25th__ We left home at 9.45.'

evidence.excerpt: We reached home before lunch. ... A really super holiday (end of Peak District trip)
Thursday March 31st. ... Simon & Tinder & I set off for Redditch & Simon got more material & more wood for things in the van. On to Brook House Farm ... Home.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Peak District trip ends on this page ('We reached home before lunch ... A really super holiday'); a short same-day outing to Redditch/Brook House Farm begins at '__Thursday March 31st.__'. Borderline trip vs. errand (van fitting-out materials + farm visit, home same day) — flagged with low confidence.

evidence.excerpt: Sunday 29th May. Simon, Eve Tinder set off at 9.15, for Hay on Wye. William & family saw a Lenny Henry talk.
Simon + I drove to see Kilpeck church + had lunch there on the way home. The weather at Hay was much kinder than we expected

boundaries.mixed_detail: Third section on B_0362_R: after the 31 March farm outing, the Hay-on-Wye festival trip begins at '__Sunday 29th May__'. Two-month date jump from the preceding section. Trip continues through B_0363-B_0364 (festival, river, Kilpeck) and ends on B_0364_R with the drive home.

boundaries.title_guess: Fleet/London then Continent: France, Switzerland, Italy (Pavia, Pian del Voglio)

evidence.excerpt: 3pm Wednesday June 15th. We left home + put Tinder in Hylton Hound Kennels at 4. We arrived at Little Bramshott Farm campsite at 6.20. Near Fleet
Friday 17th June at 7.30. we left for France. ... near Vitry la France ... on to St. Point Lake
Monday We left at 8.50. Into Switzerland. ... We reached Gadmen village + the campsite

boundaries.mixed_detail: One continuous trip: home (15 June) to Fleet/Eversley/London/Kent, then crosses to France on 17 June without returning home, continuing through Switzerland and into Italy (Pavia, Certosa, Pian del Voglio). No home return within the window.

open_at_end: The 2022 continental trip starting B_0365_L is still in progress at the window end (camped at Pian del Voglio, Italy, ~25 June 2022; B_0373 is a blank page + the Camping Relax address card). No home return — trip continues past this window.
notes: Transcribed spreads in this window run B_0361-B_0373 (book metadata range B_0301-B_0373; only B_0361 onward carries transcript text). All content matches book5 index entries pages 61-72 (years 2021-2022). B_0363_R 'no:12' and B_0372_R 'no:13' are photo/caption numbers, not diary page numbers. B_0362_R carries three distinct starts (two reported boundaries here plus the preceding Peak District end) and is heavily mixed.
